channel.title: ClawDeck Changelog
channel.description: Most recent changes with links to updates.

item.title: Version 1.1.4
item.description:
### Fixed
- **Gateway scope assignment** — Changed `client.id` to `openclaw-control-ui` so ClawDeck gets proper operator scopes when connecting. Previous `gateway-client` ID bypassed the handshake but got zero scopes.
- **Xcode version bump** — MARKETING_VERSION now matches release tag.
